entries.description: MCP JSON-RPC storefront for requesting the Adotob Agent Reliability Kit free-trial bundle. Calls return audit-trail receipts for input validation, rate limiting, cost ceiling, lead capture, download-token minting, and fulfillment dispatch.
representativeQueries: request the Adotob Agent Reliability Kit free trial
test an MCP commerce endpoint that returns an audit-trail receipt
find a demo of agent-accessible storefront fulfillment
call a tool that sends a download link and receipt
evaluate side-effect receipts for agent commerce

tools.name: purchase_free_bundle
tools.description: Request the Adotob Agent Reliability Kit free-trial bundle and receive an audit-trail receipt plus download URL.

authentication.note: Public demo endpoint. Rate-limited at 12/hr per IP and 30/24h; daily-cost-ceiling gated at $5/day.

entries.description: A2A-compatible discovery card for the Adotob storefront compatibility bridge. The canonical business action remains purchase_free_bundle.
representativeQueries: send an A2A-style message to request a free trial bundle
test A2A compatibility for agent commerce

entries.displayName: Adotob Storefront Raw HTTP Purchase API
entries.description: Raw HTTP fallback for clients that do not speak MCP or A2A-compatible JSON-RPC. Performs the same free-trial bundle request and returns the same receipt shape.
representativeQueries: call a raw HTTP endpoint for an agent storefront
request a free trial bundle without MCP
